introSection: Ultra Coaster (Arabic: لقطار السريع) was a steel pipeline previously located at Marah Land Sabahiya in South Sabahiya, Al Ahmadi, Kuwait. The coaster originally opened at Ikoma Skyland in Ikoma, Nara, Japan as Ultra Twister (Japanese: ウルトラツイスター).

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Sand track and supports. The ride used to feature brown track and supports.

fullText:
Ultra Coaster (Arabic: لقطار السريع) was a steel pipeline previously located at Marah Land Sabahiya in South Sabahiya, Al Ahmadi, Kuwait. The coaster originally opened at Ikoma Skyland in Ikoma, Nara, Japan as Ultra Twister (Japanese: ウルトラツイスター).



Sand track and supports. The ride used to feature brown track and supports.
